methodology.subtitle: A proven methodology that balances speed with intentional design decisions.
methodology.step1_desc: We immerse ourselves in your world — users, market, constraints. No assumptions, just clarity.
methodology.step2_desc: Define the solution scope, create wireframes, and validate concepts before writing a single line of code.
methodology.step3_desc: Sprint-based development with weekly demos. You see progress, give feedback, and stay in control.
methodology.step4_desc: Launch, measure, iterate. We use real data to evolve the product and drive meaningful outcomes.

reviews.heading: Trusted by Global Brands
reviews.review1_quote: "Yacaré didn't just build our product — they shaped how we think about our users. The Discovery Sprint alone saved us months of going in the wrong direction."
reviews.review2_quote: "Working with Yacaré felt like having a senior product team embedded in our company. They challenged our assumptions and delivered beyond expectations."
reviews.review3_quote: "From day one, they understood our vision. The MVP they delivered became our production app — it was that polished. Incredible attention to detail."

faq.heading: Common questions
faq.a1: Startups, product teams, and software studios that need sharper product thinking. We don't operate as a design factory—we get involved in real decisions.
faq.q2: When does it make sense to hire you?
faq.a2: When the product exists — or is about to be built — but lacks clarity. Clarity about the problem, the user, and the direction.
faq.q3: Are you just a design agency?
faq.a3: No. Design is part of the work, but we focus on product definition, validation, structure, and strategic decisions. The interface is the result, not the starting point.
faq.a4: We work in clear, focused stages. We define objectives, map the problem, and move forward with concrete deliverables. No endless projects without direction.
faq.q5: Can you work with our internal team?
faq.a5: Yes. We integrate directly with founders, developers, and marketing teams. We don't replace teams — we empower them.
faq.q6: How are you different from a traditional agency?
faq.a6: We don't sell design hours. We bring product judgment.
faq.q7: Our product is "finished." Can you still help?
faq.a7: Yes. Most "finished" products still have room to improve clarity, positioning, or conversion. That's often where we add the most value.
faq.q8: Who is not a good fit?
faq.a8: Pure execution with no room for product thinking. If you only need someone to "design screens," we're probably not the right partner.
faq.a9: With a short conversation. If there's alignment, we define a focused first stage with clear outcomes.

cta.subtitle: Share your challenge. We'll reply within 24 hours with a clear roadmap to make it happen.

about.hero_subtitle: Most agencies sell billable hours. We sell outcomes. We're a specialized team that builds digital products designed to actually move your business metrics.
about.story_p1: The yacaré is the South American caiman — agile, sharp, and fiercely effective. It thrives not by being the biggest in the water, but by being the most adaptable.
about.story_p2: We started Yacaré because we saw too many companies wasting time and money on bloated agency structures. We've optimized everything to focus on one thing: the product.
about.story_p3: We don't juggle fifty clients. When we partner with you, solving your product challenge becomes our sole obsession.
about.value1_desc: We sweat the details across every pixel and line of code, because we know that poor execution kills even the best ideas.
about.value2_desc: Speed without strategy is just rushing to failure. We move fast, but every decision is anchored in market truth.
about.value3_desc: Agencies hide behind buzzwords. We don't. We share progress continuously, flag risks early, and speak up if your idea needs a pivot.

services.hero_subtitle: We don't sell hours. We sell clarity, speed, and obsessive quality.
services.engagement_sub: Built to match your speed and product maturity.
services.ds_desc: Give shape to your idea. Explore user needs, tech possibilities and product-market fit through fast, focused early-stage sprints. We immersion ourselves in your world to provide a clear roadmap.
services.mvp_desc: From concept to working product. We design and build your minimum viable product with laser focus on what matters to your users. Launch fast, gather feedback, and validate your business model.
services.pg_desc: Already launched? We help you scale, redesign or evolve your product with ongoing design and development support. We embed as your partner to improve activation, retention and performance.

discovery.hero_title: Are you building the right thing?
discovery.hero_subtitle: Stop guessing. Transform your idea into a research-backed product strategy, ready for development.
discovery.statement: Most product ideas fail not because of technology, but because they are vague. We help you cut through the noise, validate your assumptions with real users, and deliver a crystal-clear product roadmap in just two weeks—before writing a single line of code.
discovery.process_sub: A structured journey from chaos to clarity.
discovery.step1_desc: We dive deep into your domain. Through focused workshops, we align on what success looks like.
discovery.step2_desc: We don't guess, we talk to users. Real interviews and benchmarking reveal the market's true needs.
discovery.step3_desc: Concepts become tangible. We wireframe core user flows and map out the necessary technical architecture.
discovery.step4_desc: No more endless possibilities. We deliver a concrete strategy, a validated roadmap, and high-fidelity estimates.
discovery.deliverables_sub: Tangible assets to guide your next 6 months of development.
discovery.d1_desc: A phased development plan with priorities and estimated timelines.
discovery.d2_desc: Visual representation of your product's key user journeys.
discovery.d3_desc: Recommended architecture and tools chosen for your specific scale.
discovery.d4_desc: Direct quotes and data from potential users about their actual needs.
discovery.cta_sub: Book your Discovery Sprint today and get clarity on your product's future.

mvp.hero_subtitle: Months without user feedback can kill your startup. We build your "Value Core" in 8 weeks so you can test it in the real market.
mvp.statement: Most startups fail because they build too much, too slow. We cut the bloated scope and get you into the market before your competitors do.
mvp.process_sub: A structured process. No black boxes.
mvp.step1_desc: Week 1-2: Interactive prototypes and high-fidelity UI. See the product before we write a single line of code.
mvp.step2_desc: Week 3-8: Rapid development of key user journeys. Weekly demos keep you in absolute control.
mvp.step3_desc: Week 9-10: Connecting third-party services (Stripe, Auth, APIs) and fine-tuning the experience for production.
mvp.step4_desc: Week 11-12: Rigorous QA testing, cloud deployment, and handing over the keys to your new product.
mvp.deliverables_sub: Everything you need to acquire your first 1,000 users.
mvp.d1_desc: Clean, documented, and version-controlled codebase on GitHub/GitLab.
mvp.d2_desc: Complete Figma files with a component-based design system for future growth.
mvp.d3_desc: A customized back-office tool to manage your data, users, and content without code.
mvp.d4_desc: Full setup on Vercel/AWS/GCP with tracking events configured for growth.
mvp.cta_sub: Tell us about your product idea and let's launch it in record time.

product_growth.hero_subtitle: Getting users is hard. Keeping them is harder. We embed into your company to fix leaks, boost conversions, and build features that directly impact revenue.
product_growth.statement: Products die when they stop evolving. If your internal team is trapped maintaining technical debt, we bring the senior muscle required to turn user feedback into continuous, measurable growth.
product_growth.loop_sub: Our iterative process never stops evolving your product.
product_growth.step1_desc: Deep dive into data (analytics, heatmaps) to identify real user friction points.
product_growth.step2_desc: We use the ICE framework to select improvements with the highest business impact.
product_growth.step3_desc: Bi-weekly sprints to design, build, and deploy new features and optimizations.
product_growth.step4_desc: Analyze results against KPIs. If it worked, we scale it. If not, we pivot.
product_growth.talent_sub: Hiring is slow and risky. We inject the exact specialists you need, exactly when you need them.
product_growth.talent1_desc: Crafting intuitive interfaces and seamless user experiences that convert.
product_growth.talent2_desc: Integrate LLMs, predictive models, and intelligent automation into your product.
product_growth.talent3_desc: Senior-level engineers who write clean, scalable, and maintainable code.
product_growth.talent4_desc: Turn raw metrics into actionable insights to guide product strategy.
product_growth.deliverables_sub: A team that grows with your user base.
product_growth.d1_desc: Monthly deep-dives into product metrics and technical health scores.
product_growth.d2_desc: New pages, modules, and marketing assets that stay 100% on-brand.
product_growth.d3_desc: Continuous optimization of your cloud setup to keep costs down and uptime up.
product_growth.d4_desc: A documented history of experiments, learnings, and successful conversions.
product_growth.cta_sub: Let's build a growth roadmap for your existing product.

work_sameco.statement: Designing and deploying an AI agent to centralize inquiries, automate responses, and bring operational visibility to a nonprofit education organization.
work_sameco.context_p1: SAMECO is a nonprofit association focused on promoting continuous improvement across organizations.
work_sameco.context_p2: One of their primary revenue streams comes from training programs and professional certifications. As interest grew, so did the number of inquiries — arriving through multiple channels: email, WhatsApp, and other informal touchpoints.
work_sameco.context_p3: The problem was not demand. It was dispersion.
work_sameco.context_p4: Messages were fragmented across platforms. Some were answered with delays. Others lacked traceability. There was no unified system to measure response time, conversion rates, or even total inquiry volume.
work_sameco.context_p5: Operationally, it created friction. Strategically, it created blind spots. SAMECO needed more than faster replies. They needed structure, visibility, and control.
work_sameco.solution_p1: We approached the challenge as a systems design problem. First, we analyzed stakeholder workflows to understand how inquiries were handled, who responded, and how information was recorded. The objective was to centralize without increasing operational burden.
work_sameco.solution_p2: We designed and implemented Sami, an AI-powered agent built on N8N.
work_sameco.solution_li1: Receives inquiries via email and WhatsApp
work_sameco.solution_li4: Automatically logs every interaction in HubSpot
work_sameco.solution_p3: This architecture transformed a fragmented communication flow into a measurable pipeline. Instead of scattered conversations, SAMECO now has centralized inquiry management, structured CRM records, automated first-level responses, and real-time visibility into demand patterns.
work_sameco.solution_p4: Sami was not introduced as a chatbot experiment. It was deployed as an operational layer integrated into the organization’s revenue model. Adoption was immediate, and performance has been consistent.
work_sameco.outcomes_li1: 100+ inquiries handled in the first phase
work_sameco.outcomes_li4: Response time from hours to minutes
work_sameco.team_roles:
Product Strategist
Automation Architect
AI Workflow Designer
CRM Integration Specialist

work_brandtrack.statement: Starting with a high-impact inbound landing and evolving into a long-term product design partnership focused on measurable growth.
work_brandtrack.context_p1: We first joined Brandtrack to solve a specific problem: an inbound landing page.
work_brandtrack.context_p2: The objective was clear. Improve conversion and bring structure to the onboarding experience. It was a defined, contained project with a measurable goal.
work_brandtrack.context_p4: But what happened next was more interesting.
work_brandtrack.context_p5: Instead of treating the engagement as a one-off delivery, we started looking beyond the isolated piece. The product had strong foundations, yet some components felt disconnected. Decisions had been made over time, but not always as part of a cohesive UX system.
work_brandtrack.context_p6: There was an opportunity — not for a dramatic redesign, but for structured evolution.
work_brandtrack.context_p7: The relationship with the team played a crucial role. Collaboration was fluid. Conversations were honest. We were not positioned as an external vendor delivering screens, but as a team bringing criteria, method, and speed. That shift changed the scope of the work.
work_brandtrack.solution_p1: Rather than proposing a large, abstract redesign, we introduced a milestone-based UX framework focusing on:
work_brandtrack.solution_p2: As the collaboration matured, a larger opportunity emerged: developing a full application experience that unified two separate touchpoints within the product ecosystem.
work_brandtrack.solution_p3: Previously, these lived independently. By consolidating them into a cohesive experience, we reduced friction and simplified the product narrative. This was not cosmetic refinement. It was structural simplification.
work_brandtrack.solution_p4: In parallel, we continued optimizing inbound landing flows. Conversion metrics improved as friction was reduced and onboarding clarity increased.
work_brandtrack.solution_p5: Over time, without a formal “announcement,” something shifted. We became Brandtrack’s design team.
work_brandtrack.solution_p6: Today, we operate with a living roadmap, continuous conversations, and dedicated design ownership. We no longer intervene in isolated pieces. We contribute to the ongoing evolution of the product.

work_nawaiam.statement: Designing a gamified emotional intelligence assessment that turns behavioral data into actionable insights for organizations.
work_nawaiam.context_p1: Nawaiam was building a different kind of assessment tool. Instead of traditional questionnaires, the goal was to evaluate emotional intelligence and behavioral traits through an interactive experience. The challenge was not only technological — it was conceptual.
work_nawaiam.context_p2: How do you transform psychological frameworks into a digital product that feels engaging, credible, and measurable at the same time? The platform needed to speak to two very different audiences:
work_nawaiam.context_li1: Candidates, who should feel immersed rather than evaluated.
work_nawaiam.context_li2: Organizations, who required structured, reliable data to support decision-making.
work_nawaiam.context_p3: At the same time, the product had to position itself in a competitive HR-tech landscape, where credibility and clarity are critical.
work_nawaiam.solution_p1: We worked at the intersection of product strategy, UX design, and behavioral modeling. First, we translated psychological models into a playable narrative structure. The experience was designed as an interactive journey where each decision generates behavioral signals.
work_nawaiam.solution_p2: We structured the product around three key principles:
work_nawaiam.solution_li1: Immersive interaction – The assessment feels like a game, not a test.
work_nawaiam.solution_li2: Data integrity – Every interaction maps to measurable behavioral variables.
work_nawaiam.solution_li3: Clarity for organizations – Results are presented through structured dashboards designed for HR teams and decision-makers.
work_nawaiam.solution_p3: From information architecture to interaction flows, we ensured that gameplay and data collection were aligned. The result is a platform that balances engagement with analytical rigor — transforming soft skills into structured insights.
work_nawaiam.outcomes_li3: Dual interface: candidate experience + HR dashboard
work_nawaiam.outcomes_li4: Clear positioning within the HR-tech ecosystem
work_nawaiam.team_roles:
Product Strategist
UX/UI Designer
Behavioral Model Consultant
Frontend & Backend Developers

work_pharma.statement: Redesigning internal production workflows to improve traceability, reduce friction, and increase operational efficiency in a pharmaceutical environment.
work_pharma.context_p1: Pharmaceutical production is built on precision. Every task, validation step, and approval must follow strict protocols. However, over time, internal systems tend to grow organically — new features are added, processes overlap, and complexity accumulates.
work_pharma.context_p2: The organization was facing a familiar challenge: operational workflows were technically functional, but inefficient. Users had to navigate multiple screens, manually cross-check information, and interpret fragmented data.
work_pharma.context_p3: In an industry where compliance and traceability are critical, inefficiency is not just inconvenient — it creates risk. The challenge was to redesign the workflow structure without disrupting ongoing operations or regulatory requirements.
work_pharma.context_note: *(Note: Due to compliance protocols, the client's identity remains confidential).*
work_pharma.solution_p1: We approached the project from a systems perspective. First, we mapped the complete production lifecycle, identifying bottlenecks, duplicated steps, and friction points. Instead of focusing only on interface improvements, we analyzed the underlying process logic.
work_pharma.solution_p2: Then we restructured the workflow architecture around three core principles:
work_pharma.solution_li1: Clarity of status – Every order, task, and validation step has a visible and unambiguous state.
work_pharma.solution_li2: Reduced navigation friction – Users access relevant information without unnecessary context switching.
work_pharma.solution_li3: Traceability by design – Compliance requirements are embedded into the workflow, not treated as an add-on.
work_pharma.solution_p3: We redesigned dashboards and task views to reflect operational priorities, making progress, risks, and delays immediately visible. The result was not just a cleaner interface — it was a more structured operational system aligned with real production dynamics.
work_pharma.team_roles:
Product Strategist
UX Researcher
UX Designer
Systems Analyst
Frontend & Backend Developers
work_pharma.compliance_note: * Due to compliance and confidentiality agreements, the name of the client cannot be disclosed.
